gates.name: git_local_remote_alignment_for_release_source
gates.detail: The guarded publisher verified the release commit against its configured upstream before build and deployment.

gates.name: github_production_approval_and_attestation
gates.detail: Approval run 29345354677, attempt 1, explicitly authorized the exact commit, tag, baseline, and report context; the authorization checksum and GitHub attestation verified.

gates.name: local_candidate_validation
gates.detail: The f51802d candidate closure records Python 39/39, backend 89/89, frontend 24/24, Playwright/axe 2/2, collector 8/8 plus lifecycle, and zero high/critical findings across three unique images.

gates.name: acr_immutable_images
gates.detail: Six exact-tag ACR digests were read back and recorded in a signed six-image provenance manifest.

gates.name: six_image_provenance
gates.detail: The ES256 six-image manifest verified with SHA-256 d9c8f265aaab5c7d10549f1730620a9681bb0b13ff10c8b870973f52c07b9615.

gates.name: azure_targeted_image_rollout
gates.detail: All six apps use the candidate tag and are Succeeded, Healthy, Provisioned, latest-ready aligned, and at 100 percent latest-revision traffic.

gates.name: public_http_smoke
gates.detail: UI, API health, and API readiness returned 200; readiness reported PostgreSQL, authentication, and tenant requirements ready; the protected route returned the expected 401.

gates.name: temporary_signing_rbac_revocation
gates.detail: Post-release readback found no direct signing-key scope assignment, and a signing-key data-plane read failed with ForbiddenByRbac/assignment not found.

gates.name: signed_in_admin_health_uat
gates.detail: A signed-in PatchForge.Admin session displayed 13 health checks and all 13 passed.

gates.name: signed_in_role_uat
gates.reason: Admin health was exercised, but role-by-role Reader, Analyst/Lead, CAB, and Auditor journeys were not evidenced in this session.

gates.name: fresh_docx_report_integrity
gates.reason: DOCX report generation stopped with signature_cryptographic_verification_failed; no report acceptance claim is permitted.

gates.name: closeout_report_signature_fix
gates.root_cause: Azure enum labels KeyType.ec and KeyCurveName.p_256 required strict normalization to standards-form EC and P-256 before JWK verification.
gates.cryptographic_compatibility: Legacy supported labels are normalized, but every artifact still requires full ES256 verification.

gates.name: ingestion_navigation
gates.reason: The live f51802d journey exposed the gap. Direct navigation is implemented and tested on the closeout branch but is not deployed or live-accepted.

gates.name: verified_zip_ui
gates.reason: The live f51802d journey did not provide complete verified ZIP export. The closeout branch implements and tests it locally, but it is not deployed or live-accepted.

gates.name: exact_id_uat_cleanup
gates.reason: Server issues a tenant-scoped expiring preview token bound to the SHA-256 digest of displayed exact record IDs; direct execution, cross-tenant use, record drift, and token reuse fail closed, and audit is retained. Production proof remains open.

gates.name: repaired_iac_what_if
gates.detail: The repaired closeout IaC has zero image changes and zero environment removals. Its only scale delta is scheduler minReplicas 0 to 1 because the in-process timer must stay running. Thirteen unsupported resources prevent a fully determinate apply decision.

gates.name: full_bicep_apply
gates.reason: The fresh What-If proposes release-metadata convergence on six apps and 12 probe additions while preserving image, scale, and search/OpenAI semantics. Unsupported results must be resolved or explicitly approved, and the exact closeout source/configuration delta needs a new protected approval before apply.

gates.name: azure_release_metadata_environment_readback
gates.reason: All six images use the July 14 tag, but the six apps still expose the July 11 image tag, source commit, product baseline, renderer commit, and report-context environment values.

gates.name: customer_collector_acceptance
gates.reason: Trusted code signing, clean customer-machine proof, and representative customer acceptance remain open.

gates.name: legal_and_licensing_review
gates.reason: The repository still has no root LICENSE or completed legal/licensing review.

remaining_notes: The image-only release succeeded; overall product acceptance remains partial.
Deploy and live-prove the strict EC/P-256 normalization fix before accepting report workflows.
Deploy and live-prove the closeout-branch ingestion navigation, verified ZIP, exact-ID cleanup, and remaining role journeys.
Resolve or explicitly approve the 13 unsupported What-If resources, then obtain exact approval for the six-app metadata convergence and 12 probe additions before full apply.
Trusted collector signing/customer UAT and legal/licensing review remain open.
